tagline: Fāri'i i te hau nui e 'ore roa i 'itehia
or_continue_with: 'Aore rā haere i mua nā roto i te
verify_email_desc: Tāpura i te nūmera 6 nūmera i tūhia mai i
otp_sent: Ua tūhia te OTP ma te manuia
forgot_password_desc: Tāpura i tō rata uira e tū mātou i te nūmera ha'amau nō te fa'ahou i tō parau huna.
reset_password_desc: Hāmani i te parau huna 'āpī nō tō piha.
password_reset_success: Ua fa'ahouhia te parau huna ma te manuia!
network_error: Hape o te tīti'a. Tāpe'a i tō fa'anahonaho.
something_went_wrong: Ua tupu te hō'ē hape. Tāmata fa'ahou.
profile_updated: Ua fa'ahouhia te fa'ahiti ma te manuia.
invalid_email: Tāpura i te hō'ē rata uira ti'a
login_tagline:
Hāpono i tō manava & fa'ahou i te tāpura
i tō 'āmuira'a
welcome_tagline:
Hāpono i tō manava & tāpura
i te mau ta'ata e mana'o tā'ato'a
your_posts_appear_here: Tō mau parau e fa'ahitihia i'ō nei
saved_posts_appear_here: Te mau parau e fa'ahope oe e fa'ahitihia i'ō nei
max_interests_allowed: Te rahi roa a'e e 10 hina'aro
could_not_load_feed: 'Aita i taea te ha'aputu i te feed
be_first_to_share: Na oe te parau mātāmua e fa'a'ite
permission_media_photos: Fa'atura i te rave i tō mau hōho'a i te Fa'anahonaho.
permission_media_videos: Fa'atura i te rave i tō mau vitiō i te Fa'anahonaho.
max_media_allowed: Te rahi roa a'e e {count} pūha mītia
max_hashtags_allowed: Te rahi roa a'e e {count} hashtag
video_compression_failed: Ua hape te fa'aiti i te vitiō
post_updated: Ua fa'ahouhia te parau ma te manuia!
link_copied: Ua tātauhia te tāpura i te clipboard
no_following_yet: 'Aita roa i pīhai i te ta'ata
mood_camera_subtitle: Vai'iho tō mata ia fa'a'ite i te parau
mood_camera_desc: Te fa'a'ohipa nei te ENOM i tō kāmera i mua nō te hi'o i te mau huru o te mata e 'ite i tō manava i teie nei. Tō parau mata e fa'a'ohipahia i ni'a i te aparau e 'ore roa e fa'ahopehia e fa'a'itehia.
mood_camera_privacy: Tō tāpuni e mea tā'ato'a — te mau ohipa ato'a e ravehia i ni'a i tō aparau.
mood_camera_denied_desc: Nō te 'ite i tō manava, e titauhia e te ENOM te kāmera. Pata i raro nō te tāmata fa'ahou.
mood_camera_perm_denied_desc: Ua 'ōpanihia te kāmera nō ā muri noa atu. Fa'a'ohipa i ni'a i tō fa'anahonaho aparau nō te fa'a'ohipa i te 'ite manava.
mood_camera_restricted_desc: Ua fa'atia'ihia te kāmera i ni'a i teie aparau, peneia'e nā te mau metua. Tāpe'a i tō fa'anahonaho aparau.
mood_camera_initializing: Te fa'aineine nei i te kāmera...
mood_scan_guide: Fa'ati'a i tō mata i roto i te ava'e
mood_scan_analyzing: Te hi'o nei i tō manava...
mood_scan_low_light: Māramarama iti — tāmata i te fa'a'ohipa i te flash
mood_scan_error: 'Aita i taea te 'ite i te manava. Tāmata fa'ahou.
mood_scan_no_face: 'Aita i 'itehia te mata. Fa'ati'a i tō mata i roto.
good_morning: Ia ora na i te poipoi
good_afternoon: Ia ora na i te avatea
good_evening: Ia ora na i te ahiahi
opening_camera: Te iriti nei i te kāmera
mood_msg_happy: Te fa'a'ite nei oe i te māna maitai! Fa'ahou i te fa'a'ite i te mau manava maitai.
mood_msg_calm: Tō manava e hau. E taime maitai nō te feruri.
mood_msg_sad: E mea ti'a ia manava pēnei. Rave i te hō'ē taime nō te tāutu'u ia oe iho.
mood_msg_angry: Ahu hau. Feruri i te hō'ē haere poto e aore rā te meditasion.
mood_msg_surprised: Ua rave te hō'ē mea i tō aro! Fa'ahou i te hinaaro 'ite.
mood_msg_neutral: Tō manava e tā'ato'a. Te mana'o hau e mana'o māramarama.
mood_msg_default: 'Imi i tō mata nō te 'ite i tō manava i teie nei.
view_all_comments: Hi'o i te mau parau atoa {count}
select_your_mood: Mā'iti i te huru o tō māna'o mau
scan_to_start: Hio i tō māna'o nō te hāmata i te māta'ita'i
